positive: A whimsical, detailed watercolor illustration of a fox curled up among glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and ferns. The style should be delicate, highly saturated, and evoke a peaceful, enchanted forest vibe. Studio Ghibli aesthetic, high detail, natural light.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, cartoonish
